name: Shanghai Drunk Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Thin slices Fresh ginger (crushed with the side of a cleaver)
recipeInstructions:
1. Split chicken breasts in half.
2. Rub each piece with salt and cover; chill for 2 hours.
3. Pour off any liquid that forms, then place chicken in a heatproof bowl that fits inside a steamer.
4. Cover chicken with onions and ginger. Steam over boiling water for 30 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and let cool. Pull the meat into large pieces and place in a plastic bag with cooking juices and sherry.
6. Seal the bag and refrigerate for at least one day or up to four days, turning occasionally to distribute marinade evenly.
7. To serve, remove the meat from the marinade, cut into bite-size pieces, and arrange on a serving dish.
